hero.title: Architecture built for how Vietnamese homes actually live.
hero.subtitle: A general architecture and design studio — concept design, renovations, additions, interior, and landscape. Once your plan is in place, our furniture design, making, and installation finish it better than anyone else.
hero.imageAlt: Modern Vietnamese home with a warm-lit courtyard and wood ceiling at dusk

about.title: A general architecture studio. One unmatched specialty.
about.body: Skog Mộc by TNP is a full-service architecture and design studio — concept design, construction documentation, renovations, and additions for Vietnamese homes, with interior and landscape design handled as part of the same practice. Where we go further than anyone else is furniture: once a plan is already built, or a renovation is already planned, our furniture design, making, and installation finish the space in a way the rest of the market doesn't match.
about.point1: Full architectural design, from concept through construction documentation
about.point2: Furniture design, making, and installation — our unmatched specialty
about.point3: Interior and landscape design, handled as part of the same practice
about.point4: Furniture also available on its own, once your plan or renovation is already in place

statement.title:
Plans Built.
Furniture
Finished Best.
statement.body: We're architects first — houses, renovations, and additions, designed around how a Vietnamese household actually lives. It's furniture where nobody touches us: once a plan exists, that's where we finish best.
statement.lead: Every project is designed for a real home in Vietnam — and, when it gets to furniture, finished better than anyone else.

manifesto.title: Our craft is to <accent>tell your story</accent> through architecture. Every room is designed <accent>to evoke a feeling</accent> — rooted in how a Vietnamese home truly lives, carried <accent>beyond the merely functional</accent>.
manifesto.caption: Story before structure — rooted in how Vietnamese homes live.

banner.title:
Built to Plan.
Finished
Like No One Else.

formula.title:
Design It.
Installed.
formula.note: Designed for Vietnamese homes — tropical climate, narrow urban lots, and multi-generational households, not generic floor plans.

installation.title: Where we're unmatched: furniture, installed.

installation.statement:
Designed To Plan.
Installed
Like No One Else.

items.title: Town Planner

items.title: Historic Buildings Inspector

items.title: Structural Engineer

extended.note: Available as needed, via our network.

q1.question: Are you a furniture company, or a full architecture practice?
q1.answer: We're a general architecture and design studio — concept design, construction documentation, renovations, and additions. Furniture is our specialty within that practice: design, making, and installation, delivered once your plan or renovation is already in place. It's the part of the process nobody else matches us on.

q2.question: What if I already have my own installer or fabricator?
q2.answer: That's fine — many clients do. We design to a level of detail any competent installer or fabricator can work from, and we're happy to coordinate with your chosen team if you want that handoff support; it's not required.

q3.question: Do you only design furniture, or also full architecture and interiors?
q3.answer: Full architecture and interiors — that's the core of our practice. Furniture is designed alongside it, or on its own once a plan already exists. Renovation and addition projects typically need an initial site survey before concept design begins.

q4.question: What's included in a full design package?
q4.answer: Deliverables vary by project — we'll confirm the exact set (concept drawings, visualisations, material specification, fabrication-ready drawings, and furniture layout) with you during consultation.

q5.question: How long does the design process take?
q5.answer: Timelines vary by project scope and scale. See our Process page for a phase breakdown; we'll give you a realistic estimate during consultation.

q6.question: What materials and finishes do you work with?
q6.answer: Material and finish choices are confirmed for each piece based on durability, budget, and the Vietnamese climate — we'll walk you through options during consultation.

q7.question: What areas of Vietnam do you work in?
q7.answer: Contact us with your project location and we'll confirm whether it's within our current service area.

q8.question: Can you bring in a structural engineer, town planner, or other specialist if my project needs one?
q8.answer: Yes — beyond our core architecture and furniture work, we have access to a network of additional specialists (architectural technologist, interior and spatial designer, building surveyor, town planner, production designer, historic buildings inspector, structural engineer) and bring the right one in when a project calls for it.

cta.title: Let's Price Your Project.
cta.body: Every quote starts with a real conversation about your home, your site, and your budget — no templates, no guesswork.

Most of what's shown here is furniture design, making, and installation, the specialty we're best known for.

Best Known
For Furniture.
Built On Architecture.
statement.body: The work here leans heavily toward furniture design, making, and installation, because that's where our reputation comes from — but every piece exists inside a house, renovation, or interior we either designed ourselves or finished for a plan already underway.
statement.lead: Real locations. Real property types. No invented case studies.

note.body: Houses, villas, and penthouses — finished better than anyone else.

cta.title: Let's Design Yours.
cta.body: Whatever stage your project is at, the conversation starts the same way — tell us about your home, your site, and what you're hoping for.

hero.title: Our Process
hero.subtitle: Every plan documented to the last detail. Every trade — architecture, interior, furniture, landscape — working as one studio. Every home designed for how you actually live.

statement.title:
Six Steps.
No Skipped
Stages.
statement.body: Every project moves through the same disciplined sequence — consultation, concept, development, documentation, optional installation, and handover — regardless of size.
statement.lead: No shortcuts taken to hit a deadline. No phase skipped to save a fee.

manifesto.title: We don't <accent>start drawing</accent> until we understand your household — then we don't <accent>stop documenting</accent> until your fabricator needs <accent>nothing explained twice</accent>.
manifesto.caption: Process before product — every time.

roadmap.statement: From first sketch to final handover — finished better than anyone else.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what information we collect and how we use it.

s01.heading: What we collect
s01.body: When you submit our project inquiry or professional inquiry form, we collect your name, email, phone number (optional), and project or collaboration details. We use this solely to respond to your enquiry and discuss your project. We do not collect data automatically through cookies beyond a single functional preference cookie for the language banner.

s02.heading: How we use your data
s02.body: Your contact details are used to respond to your inquiry, schedule a consultation, and follow up if you haven't received a response. We do not use your data for unsolicited marketing. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties except where required by law.

s03.heading: Data storage
s03.body: Form submissions are processed via Formspree (formspree.io), a third-party form service. Formspree's privacy policy governs data processed on their platform. We retain your enquiry details for as long as necessary to fulfil your request or as required by Vietnamese law.

s04.heading: Cookies
s04.body: This website uses a single functional cookie to remember your language or privacy banner preference. No tracking cookies, advertising pixels, or analytics scripts are used. We do not use Google Analytics or any third-party tracking services.

s05.heading: Your rights
s05.body: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data. To exercise these rights, email thuyken52914@yahoo.com.vn. We will respond within 30 days.

s06.heading: Contact us
s06.body: For privacy questions: thuyken52914@yahoo.com.vn · +84 90 333 37 29 · Lô 35 đường số 9, KCN Tam Phước, Biên Hòa, Vietnam
